LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH INCORPORATED'S AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY ACTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. ARBITRATION CLAUSE IS CONTAINED IN THE 2006 U4 FORM THAT REQUIRES PLAINTIFF TO ARBITRATE DISPUTE WITH HIS "FIRM". B.A.I. WAS SUCCEEDED BY MERRILL LYNCH WHICH ASSUMED ALL RIGHTS AND LIABILITIES. ARBITRATION CLAUSES ARE ALSO CONTAINED IN THE BONUS AGREEMENT AND PROMISSORY NOTE. NO SHOWING MADE THAT ANY ARBITRATION CLAUSE IN UNCONSCIONABLE, INVALID, OR UNENFORCEABLE. ALL OTHER MATTERS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION IS OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

(Amended) Notice Of Hearing On Deft'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion To Stay Action
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MERRILL LYNCH, PIERCE, FENNER & SMITH INCORPORATED'S AMENDED PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY ACTION

Appearances:
Greg J. Richardson of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe (773.5822) appearing for defendant and moving party
Louis J. Bachleder (876.0275) appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Arbitration clause is contained in the 2006 U4 form that requires plaintiff to arbitrate dispute with his "firm". B.A.I. was succeeded by Merrill Lynch which assumed all rights and liabilities. Arbitration clauses are also contained in the Bonus agreement and promissory note. No showing made that any arbitration clause in unconscionable, invalid, or unenforceable. All other matters stayed pending completion of arbitration. Further, plaintiff's objection is overruled. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR #5797
